title: Lines To A Laurel-Leaf, Sent To The Author By Miss  ---- .
content:
Tho' unknown is the hand that bestow'd thee on me,
    Sweet leaf! ev'ry fibre I'll warm with a kiss:
    With the fame of her beauty thou well dost agree,
    Whose presence shews conquest, whose triumph is bliss!
meaning:
"Lines To A Laurel-Leaf, Sent To The Author By Miss  ---- ." is a quintessential example of John Carr (Sir)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
